task_objective: Batch Singleton Metrics (n_unique) to improve performance on wide tables
design_decisions: Replaced per-column subqueries for n_unique with window-based batching in QueryPlanner.
Used mutate() + aggregate(sum) pattern for efficient singleton counting.
Implemented chunking (batch_size=50) to prevent OOM on extremely wide tables.
Initialized n_unique to 0 in SummaryEngine to ensure consistency across all tables.
Disabled correlations and other expensive passes in benchmarks to isolate singleton performance.

results.performance_gain: Reduced n_unique execution for 100 columns from ~40s (sequential) to ~1.3s (batched).
results.correctness: Verified against high cardinality, duplicates, nulls, and empty tables.
results.regressions: None detected in existing profiler and metrics tests.
